name: Lying 01
prompt: A detailed close-up of a girl's butt from behind. The girl is lying on her stomach on a bed, with a close-up of her labia and panties, her breasts protruding, and her arms bent at the elbows. She's looking left, past the camera.

name: Lying 02
prompt: A frontal medium shot of a character reclining against the backrest of a sofa. Both arms are raised with the hands resting behind the head, framing the face. The upper body is slightly tilted, creating a relaxed vibe. The camera is at eye level.
hint: Полулежит на диване, обе руки закинуты за голову, фронтальный ракурс.

name: Lying 03
prompt: A frontal medium shot of a character reclining in a upholstered armchair. The character's body is relaxed, and both hands are resting symmetrically on the hips. The head is tilted slightly forward with a neutral gaze. The camera is at eye level.
hint: Полулежит в зеленом кресле, руки лежат на бедрах.

name: Lying 04
prompt: A frontal shot of a character reclining on an ornate sofa. The character is leaning back with their weight supported by the sofa's backrest, and legs are spread wide. One arm is raised high, with the hand resting on the back of the head, while the other arm is draped loosely to the side.

name: Lying 05

The character's head is tilted back with hair flowing on the floor, and one hand is placed gently on the side of the knee. The pose is relaxed and creates a distinctive 'L' shape.

name: Lying 23

hint: Лежа на спине, колени подтянуты к груди, ноги скрещены, вид сверху.

name: Lying 30
